ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Start", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton account get flow Process API Started" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {customerId: vars.customerId}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Started" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "query": "Select Id,Name, Industry, Type,BillingAddress, ShippingAddress,Phone,website From", "payload": "where Id='" ++ vars.customerId ++ "'", "objectName": "Account" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "End", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton get flow Process API Ended" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".end", additionalInfo : {targetResponse:payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Completed" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Middle", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton common flow Process API Started" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : "common flow to call SFDC system api Started", logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "In Progress" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "HTTP-500", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "HTTPANY-500", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent }

validation:is-true.doc:name: Check for errors other than connectivity errors

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Middle", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton common flow Process API Ended" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".end", additionalInfo : "common flow to call SFDC system api Ended", logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "In Progress" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Start", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton account create flow Process API Started" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {requestPayload: payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Started" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: payload.items.id[0], status: "Completed", message: "Account Created Successfully" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "End", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton account create flow Process API Ended" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".end", additionalInfo : {targetResponse:payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Completed" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Start", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton account update flow Process API Started" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {requestPayload: payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Started" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { query: payload.query, payload: payload.payload map { "Industry": $.Industry, "Type": $.Type, "Phone": $.Phone, "BillingCountry": $.BillingCountry, "BillingCity": $.BillingCity, "BillingStreet": $.BillingStreet, "BillingLatitude": $.BillingLatitude, "BillingPostalCode": $.BillingPostalCode, "BillingGeocodeAccuracy": $.BillingGeocodeAccuracy, "BillingState": $.BillingState, "BillingLongitude": $.BillingLongitude, "Website": $.Website, "ShippingCountry": $.ShippingCountry, "ShippingCity": $.ShippingCity, "ShippingStreet": $.ShippingStreet, "ShippingLatitude": $.ShippingLatitude, "ShippingPostalCode": $.ShippingPostalCode, "ShippingGeocodeAccuracy": $.ShippingGeocodeAccuracy, "ShippingState": $.ShippingState, "ShippingLongitude": $.ShippingLongitude, "Name": $.Name, "Id": vars.customerId.Id }, objectName: payload.objectName }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: payload.items.id[0], status: "Completed", message: "Account Updated Successfully" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "End", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton account update flow Process API Ended" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".end", additionalInfo : {targetResponse:payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "Completed" }
